productDisplayName: Levis Kids Girl's Darla Pink Kidswear
description: CompositionBaby pink top with round neck, made of 100% cotton, white vest stitched to the top, shiny chest print and short sleevesFittingRegular15 cmWash care Machine wash separately in cold water, colour will bleed Use mild detergent Dry cleaning possible Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Dry flat inside out in shade Iron at medium setting only Iron on reverse Wash before wearing Indulge your little one in happy feelings with this pink tee-inside-a-top from Levi's. The shiny print of the brand coupled with leafy yet pretty prints fill this tee with a spirit of wonder and happiness. Team this with small white skirts and comfy crocs footwear for a happy, casual outing with her small buddies, while the pure cotton fabric stays soft on her skin and keeps her fresh and comfortable all day.
